title: ternstroemia lineata subsp. chalicophila
intro: Ternstroemia lineata subsp. chalicophila is a plant species also known as the 'Bitter Plum' or 'Wild Plum', belonging to the family Ternstroemiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, and its bark and roots have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ternstroemia lineata subsp. chalicophila include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
